## Checklist
Please check that your PR fulfills these requirements:
- [ ] I have read the contribution guidelines in CONTRIBUTING.md
- [ ] The code builds clean without any errors or warnings (`make build`)
- [ ] All tests pass locally (`make test`)
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix/feature works
- [ ] I have updated documentation accordingly
- [ ] I have run the acceptance tests if modifying resources (`make testacc`)
- [ ] I have run `terraform fmt` on any example configurations
- [ ] I have tested example configurations in `/examples`

## Type of Change
What types of changes does your code introduce? Put an `x` in all that apply:
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change addressing an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change adding functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature causing existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Documentation update
